# Native Desktop C++ Dependency Manifest

Scope: baseline native C++/Vulkan dependencies for the quiz native remake.
All paths are relative to `/mnt/c/aa/build/external/lib/cpp/desktop`.

Generated on 2026-05-08.
Temporary archives were downloaded under `_tmp` and removed after extraction.

## Downloaded

| Name | Version / tag / ref | Source URL | License file | Local path | Size | SHA-256 | Reason | Integration notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | ---: | --- | --- | --- |
| Vulkan-Headers | `vulkan-sdk-1.4.341.0`, ref `b5c8f996196ba4aa6d8f97e52b5d3b6e70f7e4e2` | https://github.com/KhronosGroup/Vulkan-Headers/archive/refs/tags/vulkan-sdk-1.4.341.0.tar.gz | `Vulkan-Headers-vulkan-sdk-1.4.341.0/LICENSE.md` (`Apache-2.0 OR MIT` for most files) | `Vulkan-Headers-vulkan-sdk-1.4.341.0` | 37M | archive `d73bc5036b6556b741f6985ff600ca720308c5f2850e4a43ceb498bd3de069e7` | Canonical Vulkan API headers and registry files for real device, swapchain, pipeline, and extension work. | Add `Vulkan-Headers-vulkan-sdk-1.4.341.0/include` to include paths before including `vulkan/vulkan.h`. Keep aligned with Vulkan-Loader and SPIRV-Headers SDK tags. |
| Vulkan-Loader | `vulkan-sdk-1.4.341.0`, ref `32fcb949e253cbeb40cda7ea76122b492db579ae` | https://github.com/KhronosGroup/Vulkan-Loader/archive/refs/tags/vulkan-sdk-1.4.341.0.tar.gz | `Vulkan-Loader-vulkan-sdk-1.4.341.0/LICENSE.txt` (`Apache-2.0` with more permissive exceptions) | `Vulkan-Loader-vulkan-sdk-1.4.341.0` | 9.6M | archive `fe982697c780a950641bfcf94707135c26c501352242d285fa95d087d691292e` | Source for the Vulkan loader used to resolve ICDs, layers, and dispatch paths without downloading the full Vulkan SDK installer. | Build only when the desktop runtime needs a local loader; otherwise prefer the platform loader installed by the system/driver. Requires Vulkan-Headers when built. |
| VulkanMemoryAllocator | `v3.3.0`, ref `1d8f600fd424278486eade7ed3e877c99f0846b1` | https://github.com/GPUOpen-LibrariesAndSDKs/VulkanMemoryAllocator/archive/refs/tags/v3.3.0.tar.gz | `VulkanMemoryAllocator-v3.3.0/LICENSE.txt` (`MIT`) | `VulkanMemoryAllocator-v3.3.0` | 4.4M | archive `c4f6bbe6b5a45c2eb610ca9d231158e313086d5b1a40c9922cb42b597419b14e` | Practical GPU memory allocation layer for Vulkan buffers, images, heaps, and future staging/upload paths. | Primary header is `VulkanMemoryAllocator-v3.3.0/include/vk_mem_alloc.h`; compile exactly one implementation translation unit with `VMA_IMPLEMENTATION`. |

Choose and document the FreeType License path for non-GPL app distribution. |

## Deferred

| Name | Reference checked | Reason deferred | Revisit trigger |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| SPIRV-Tools | `vulkan-sdk-1.4.341.0`, ref `fbe4f3ad913c44fe8700545f8ffe35d1382b7093` | Larger shader tooling source tree and build surface than the current baseline needs. SPIRV-Headers was downloaded as the lightweight prerequisite. | Download when runtime/offline shader validation, optimization, or assembler/disassembler tooling becomes part of the native build plan. |
| glslang | `vulkan-sdk-1.4.341.0`, ref `f0bd0257c308b9a26562c1a30c4748a0219cc951` | Useful for GLSL/HLSL-to-SPIR-V compilation, but it adds a separate shader compiler build and integration decision. | Download when the project chooses an in-repo shader compiler path instead of precompiled SPIR-V assets or an external developer toolchain. |
| Full Vulkan SDK installer | Not downloaded | Too large and installer-oriented for this scoped external source dependency task. | Use only as a developer machine prerequisite note if validation layers, shader tools, or loader binaries are needed outside source-vendored builds. |
| ICU source | Not downloaded | Too large for the current text baseline; HarfBuzz can be built without ICU while text shaping is evaluated. | Revisit only if full locale services, collation, or advanced Unicode boundary behavior is required in-app. |

## Notes

- No package manager or global install command was run.
- No files under `apps/`, `codex/`, `build/external/tools/bootstrap/`, source code, or tests were edited.
- `_tmp` was removed after downloads completed; extracted source directories and the single-header folders remain.
- The HarfBuzz source release is the largest item at about 101M extracted. If repository size becomes a concern, replace it with a narrower source snapshot after the text backend build plan is settled.
